result.stdout:
Description:
  Disables or Enables NuGet Package creation on Build.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.NuGetToggleOnBuild [options]

Options:
  --setToActive (REQUIRED)                 Boolean to indicate if NuGet creation on build should be enabled or disabled.
  --workspace <workspace> (REQUIRED)       Folder location containing the solution.
  --onlyOnConfiguredNuGet                  Boolean to indicate if the command should apply only to projects that have a Package ID, Package License or PackageProjectUrl configured.
  --solution-filepath <solution-filepath>  The filepath to the solution.
  --version                                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
